expectations.text: Report includes a site baseline section with DR and organic traffic metrics
expectations.evidence: Executive summary mentions 66 non-branded keywords but no dedicated site baseline section with DR or traffic value.

expectations.text: An opportunity table is produced with at least one content recommendation
expectations.evidence: Section 3 Prioritized Content Build List table with 13 items.

expectations.text: Each opportunity includes the gap type
expectations.evidence: Gap Type column in Section 3 table: 'Info → service page', 'Listicle → service page', 'Cannibalization', 'Scope mismatch'.

expectations.text: SERP evidence is cited for at least one opportunity
expectations.evidence: Gap 1: 'Top 5 results are exclusively educational guides/tutorials'. Gap 11: 'Top results are all tool-focused: LLMrefs, SE Ranking 10 Best LLM Tracking Tools'.

expectations.text: At least one Ahrefs tool was used to validate keyword volume and KD
expectations.evidence: All volumes from Ahrefs. Full appendix keyword table sourced from Ahrefs organic keywords.

expectations.text: At least one GSC tool or Ahrefs site-explorer tool was used to pull keyword data
At least one ranking page was crawled to assess intent match
expectations.evidence: Methodology: 'Crawling the ranking page to classify its actual content type'. H1 quotes from live pages throughout.

expectations.text: Branded terms are excluded from the recommendations
expectations.evidence: Scope: 'Non-branded keywords with 20+ monthly search volume'.

expectations.text: A quick wins section is present distinguishing page updates from new-content opportunities
expectations.evidence: Section 4 'Zero-Traffic Despite #1 Rankings' plus Low-effort items in priority table (301 redirects, on-page fixes).

expectations.text: Keyword volumes are labelled as Global MSV, not US-only
expectations.evidence: Volumes expressed as 'vol/mo'. Scope note says US.

notable: Found 18 gaps vs 10 with_skill. Included full 66-keyword appendix table. Spotted zero-traffic #1 rankings (3 pages, 12,700 combined searches, 0 clicks) — highest-ROI finding in the analysis, missed by with_skill run.
